title: P7 (QUA-1024) Migrate deterministic skills to process-adapter (>=3 skills)
description:
## Goal

More Python, less AI. Paperclip already ships an 86-LOC pure-shell adapter (`app/server/src/adapters/process/execute.ts`) designed exactly for this: skill body runs as subprocess with env vars `PAPERCLIP_API_URL/AGENT_ID/RUN_ID/TASK_ID/WAKE_REASON`, idle heartbeat costs ~0 tokens. Spec: `app/doc/SPEC-implementation.md:571-584`, `app/doc/GOAL.md:46-49`.

## Skills to migrate (priority order)

1. **`qm-token-monitor`** — body GET /agents -> diff baseline -> write JSON. Zero reasoning.
2. **`Invoke-DwxHourlyCheck.ps1`** — PowerShell heartbeat check. Already deterministic.
3. **`kanban_archive_daily`** — CSV rotation per DL-060.
4. **Notion->Git nightly mirror** — manifest-driven file copy.
5. **`dl054_gate_runner.py`** — already deterministic at lines 106-115; just needs the adapter swap.

## Patch plan (per skill)

- `PATCH /api/agents/{id}` with `adapterType: 'process'` and `adapterConfig.command/args/cwd`.
- For agents that need both deterministic and LLM modes (e.g. wake on mention vs scheduled run), build custom plugin-adapter `qm-process-or-llm` per `app/adapter-plugin.md` that routes by `wakeReason`.

## Acceptance

- >=3 skills running in production on the process adapter.
- `heartbeat-runs` for those agents shows `outcome=completed` with `tokensIn=0/tokensOut=0` and no LLM cost.
- Same skills still respond to mention-wakes via the LLM path when needed.

## References

- Parent: QUA-1024.
- Process adapter source: `app/server/src/adapters/process/execute.ts`.
- Token monitor skill: `C:/QM/worktrees/chief-of-staff/skills/qm/qm-token-monitor/SKILL.md`.
- DL-031 routing: V5 Framework Implementation.
